task_description: Phase 42 FEAT-005: Implement voice command grammar, custom shortcuts (verbal macros), alias registry, intent parser, and command executor in the device-control package. Supports English + Hindi/Hinglish commands, user-defined aliases, multi-step shortcut sequences.

verification.summary: Typecheck passes cleanly. All 136 tests pass after review fixes. Fixed: capability type mismatch (nullish coalescing for unknown caps), sequence confirmation option, pre-compiled alias regex with length limit, pattern ordering comment, removed dead type field.
